transcript: --motherfucker, it's like this... you've got the balls, I've got the guts... we'll meet out in the parking lot. Any time.
Aw, bullshit. So, I'll tell you what. Any time you come around here... you better be-- '[beep]' --armed to the teeth, guy.
I'm gonna... I'm gonna bust your teeth, how's that sound?
Aw, bullshit. Because I've got news for you... I ain't got no teeth for you to bust.
Come on over and do it, mister!
Talk's cheap, man! Put your mouth where your foot... put your fist where your mouth is! 'Cause that's exactly where I'm gonna put mine!
You're gonna be going to the--
Mister, I have seen death so many times. I've been shot, I've been knifed... '[beep]' All blow and no show.
Oh, yeah, I'll... you show me your lip, I'll put it on the pavement. 'Cause I've got news for you... we'll all have a big pow-wow!
And it ain't gonna be... it'll be me, and my fist, and you kissin' the earth!
I put you... '[beep]' fuckheads underneath the ground so far, you guys have to dig into China to find your pricks!
And it... you know what? You blow so much hot air, I could probably put the phone to my dick--
You is all blow and no show. If you ain't gonna show, don't even blow!
